summary: Fixed critical bug and verified MEA Analysis updates. Bug: 'drugConcentrations is not defined' and 'lightConfig is not defined' in getAnalysisState callback - fixed by replacing with correct variable names (drugSettings, lightParams). All 5 tabs load correctly after fix. Features verified through code review and UI testing.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be a child of <span> in tbody - cosmetic warning, non-breaking
Recharts width/height warnings when charts have no data to display - cosmetic, non-breaking

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: ReferenceError 'drugConcentrations is not defined' - changed to drugSettings in getAnalysisState callback
FIXED: ReferenceError 'lightConfig is not defined' - changed to lightParams in getAnalysisState callback
All zoom controls (+ - Reset + brush slider) present in SpikeTraceChartWithZoom, BurstTraceChartWithZoom, SpikeRasterPlotWithZoom, BurstRasterPlotWithZoom components
Drug overlays (purple #a855f7) implemented in all trace and raster charts
Light overlays (amber #facc15) implemented in all trace and raster charts
SaveRecording component properly integrated with full Tissue Information and Recording Information sections
seed_data_creation: Used /app/mea_test_data/ CSV files (non-Axion format with 0 electrodes detected)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix applied: drugConcentrations and lightConfig replaced with drugSettings and lightParams in getAnalysisState callback. MEA Analysis page now loads without runtime errors. Test data has 0 electrodes so charts show 'No data' messages, but code structure is correct. To test with visible data/overlays, use Axion-format CSV files with proper electrode naming (e.g., A1_44).

1_mea_analysis_loads.details: MEA Analysis page loads without errors after bug fix. All 5 tabs visible: Parameters, Spontaneous Activity, Light Stimulus, Save Recording, Export

2_parameters_tab_zoom_controls.details: SpikeTraceChartWithZoom and BurstTraceChartWithZoom components have zoom controls (+ - Reset + Brush). Controls show when data exists.

3_drug_overlay_purple.details: Purple (#a855f7) ReferenceArea overlays present in all chart components for drugWindow

4_light_overlay_amber.details: Amber (#facc15) ReferenceArea overlays present in all chart components for lightPulses

5_spontaneous_tab_zoom.details: All 4 charts (spike trace, burst trace, spike raster, burst raster) use WithZoom components

6_light_stimulus_tab_zoom.details: Light Stimulus tab has zoom controls (2 zoom buttons found in UI test)

7_save_recording_tab.details: SaveRecording component displays with all required fields: Tissue Information, Recording Information, Sample Information, Cell Type, Line Name, Passage, Differentiation Date, Transfection, Recording Date, Recording Name

8_zoom_sync_within_tabs.details: parametersZoomDomain shared between spike and burst traces in Parameters tab. spontaneousZoomDomain shared between all 4 charts in Spontaneous tab. lightZoomDomain shared in Light Stimulus tab.

ui_verification.run_analysis_button_works: PASS - Analysis runs without error after fix

bug_fixed.issue: MEAAnalysis component crashed with 'drugConcentrations is not defined' and 'lightConfig is not defined' errors when running analysis
bug_fixed.root_cause: getAnalysisState callback used undefined variables drugConcentrations and lightConfig instead of the actual state variables drugSettings and lightParams
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed drugConcentrations to drugSettings and lightConfig to lightParams in getAnalysisState callback and its dependency array
